_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative genomic analyses of neurofibromatosis tumours identify SOX9 as a biomarker and survival gene.

_contextSnippet: in preliminary experiments in which we expressed SOX9 in plexiform NFSCs, we observed no change in cell proliferation or cell death
details: Expressing SOX9 in plexiform NFSCs showed no change in cell proliferation or cell death in preliminary experiments
